headline: CONFIRMATION. Treasury cancellation of all 31 Booz Allen contracts ($21M obligations) following IRS contractor unauthorized-disclosure conviction was already absorbed in the April 25 baseline (composite 36.7, Developing band, post-correction). No NEW acute in-window April 25-28 evidence. Composite 36.7 holds.

evidence.finding: Treasury Secretary Bessent: cancelled all 31 Booz Allen contracts ($21M obligations) citing loss of confidence in screening/vetting capabilities. Triggering event: contractor pleaded guilty to unauthorized tax-data disclosure (5-year sentence).
Bessent testimony confirms scope and rationale.
